description_long: This is a classic city bicycle with a step-through frame, finished in a deep red color with black and silver accents. The bicycle features two large, thin wheels with metal spokes and black rubber tires, complemented by full fenders over both wheels for protection against splashes. The handlebars are wide and swept back, providing an upright and comfortable riding posture, and are fitted with black grips. The seat is a standard black saddle, slightly padded for comfort, and mounted on a single seat post. The drivetrain is enclosed with a chain guard, and the pedals are simple and flat. There is no visible basket or rack, giving the bicycle a clean and streamlined appearance suitable for urban commuting.
description: A red step-through city bicycle with swept-back handlebars, black saddle, and full fenders, designed for comfortable urban riding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, swept-back handlebars, front fender, and narrow profile of the front wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the step-through frame, full fenders, chain guard, and the black saddle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back fender, seat, and alignment of the rear wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the frame geometry, drivetrain, and absence of a basket or rack.
